commands: sudo docker exec bookcabin-app sh -lc 'printenv | sort | grep -E "APP_ENV|DB_|REDIS_|BOOKING_AGENT_URL" || true'
sudo docker exec bookcabin-app sh -lc 'ls -la /var/www/html/storage/logs || true'
sudo docker exec bookcabin-app sh -lc 'if [ -f /var/www/html/storage/logs/laravel.log ]; then tail -n 100 /var/www/html/storage/logs/laravel.log; fi'
